metadata.description: Azure region for deployment (inherited from --location flag)
Unique environment name for this deployment (e.g., dev, test, prod). Different values create isolated environments with separate resources.
RPI container image tag
Container registry (full path without image name)
Container registry server (e.g. rg1acrpub.azurecr.io)

Override individual image names. Keys: interactionapi, deploymentapi, executionservice, nodemanager, integrationapi, realtimeapi, callbackapi, queuereader, rediscache, rabbitmq, mongodb. Example: { interactionapi: "redpoint-interaction-api" }
Container registry username
Container registry password
Database type: sqlserver or postgresql
Database admin username
Database admin password
Use existing pre-created database server and databases instead of creating new ones
FQDN of the existing database server (required when useExistingDatabase=true). Example: myserver.database.windows.net or myserver.postgres.database.azure.com
Name of the existing Pulse database (required when useExistingDatabase=true)
Name of the existing Pulse Logging database (required when useExistingDatabase=true)
Ingress domain for external access
Ingress visibility: external (public) or internal (private, VNet only)
Name of the Key Vault containing the TLS certificate for custom domain binding. Leave empty to skip certificate binding.
Resource group containing the Key Vault with the TLS certificate
Subscription ID containing the Key Vault with the TLS certificate (defaults to the deployment subscription)
Certificate name in the Key Vault (e.g., redpointcdp-com). The latest version is always used.
Enable Realtime API
Enable Callback API
Enable Queue Reader
Realtime cache provider
Cache deployment type: managed (Azure service), internal (container in environment), or external (BYO connection string)
External cache connection string (required when cacheProviderType=external)
Realtime queue provider
Queue deployment type: managed (Azure service), internal (container in environment), or external (BYO connection details)
External queue connection string (required when queueProvider=servicebus and queueProviderType=external)
External RabbitMQ hostname (required when queueProvider=rabbitmq and queueProviderType=external)
External RabbitMQ password (required when queueProvider=rabbitmq and queueProviderType=external)
Use an existing Log Analytics workspace instead of creating a new one
Resource ID of an existing Log Analytics workspace (required when useExistingLogAnalytics=true)
Resource group containing the existing Log Analytics workspace (required when useExistingLogAnalytics=true)
Log Analytics workspace retention in days (only used when creating a new workspace)
Container app CPU (cores)
Container app memory
Execution service CPU (cores)
Execution service memory
Use an existing VNet. When true, provide existingVnetId and existingSubnetId.
Resource ID of an existing VNet (required when useExistingVnet=true)
Resource ID of an existing subnet for the Container Apps Environment (required when useExistingVnet=true). Must be delegated to Microsoft.App/environments and at least /23.
Enable private endpoints for Key Vault, Storage, and Database. Requires VNet integration.
Resource ID of an existing subnet for private endpoints (can be the same as or different from the Container Apps subnet)
Use existing private DNS zones instead of creating new ones. Set to true if your subscription already has privatelink.* zones linked to the VNet.
Resource group containing the existing private DNS zones (required when useExistingDnsZones=true)
Subscription ID containing the existing private DNS zones (required when zones are in a different subscription). Defaults to the deployment subscription.
